title: 100Pcs Bamboo Cocktail Picks Toothpicks for Appetizers Natural Bamboo Knot Skewers Mini Food Sticks for Drinks Canapes Appetizers Party Supplies (12cm/4.7inch)
features: 【Widely Applicable】The creative cocktail picks are perfect for snacks, fruits, dessert, appetizer, club sandwiches, kebabs, etc.
【Unique Design】Bamboo cocktail stir sticks with looped knot end adds style to your food presentation. It's easy to decorate and pierce decor.
【Perfect Decoration】Fancy toothpicks are great for garnishing cocktails and food, making your food or drinks look more delicate and attractive.
【Package Include】You will get 100 pieces twisted ends bamboo picks, enough quantity to meet your daily or party toothpick needs.
【High Quality】Appetizer picks are made of 100% natural bamboo, biodegradable and eco-friendly.
